summary: P11 backend and frontend functional trial deployment package exists, but user feedback exposed a valid PM/UI gap: frontend pages were implemented from API and E2E needs without a frozen UI/UX design. The system can be used for functional trial, but final user-facing UI usability is not accepted until P12 frontend rework follows docs/ui/ui-design.md.

issues.problem: Current frontend is functionally connected but organized as an API-driven engineering UI, with too much page logic concentrated in App.ts and no prior frozen information architecture, wireframe, interaction state or component guideline.
issues.suggestion: FE-023 and FE-024 have been implemented against docs/ui/ui-design.md; keep final user-facing usability blocked until TEST-010, VAL-008 and REV-008 pass.

issues.problem: Previous PM acceptance over-weighted build, API closure and browser E2E, but under-specified UI/UX design as a separate delivery gate.
issues.suggestion: P12 has added a UI/UX design gate and task plan; final deployability remains false until UI rework and review pass.

deferredRisks.reason: Create-system idempotency still uses single-JVM memory storage. Production multi-instance consistency needs shared storage or a database idempotency table.
npm ci previously reported moderate audit items. Dependency governance should be handled separately from feature delivery.
OpenAPI nonce replay, IP whitelist, idempotency conflict and high-concurrency scenarios remain recommended before production launch.

verification: FE-023 produced shell navigation and system overview UI
FE-024 produced domain UI rework, removed window.prompt interactions, added stateful tabs, and npm.cmd run build pass
TEST-010/VAL-008/REV-008 are pending; fullProjectDeployable remains false
